patch.value: Configurable vector store collection name (post-v0.1 adapter optimization)
PRD line 1679 defers broader adapter optimization; DEFAULT_COLLECTION='pm_items' is hardcoded, blocking shared Qdrant instances across projects and multi-workspace hosting.
Optional vector_store.collection_name (non-empty, default pm_items) wired through Qdrant target+LanceDB table; validator+PRD 13.4+README+tests.
